summary: Updated the project's decomp-toolkit dependency from v0.7.3 to v0.7.4 in both the Nix package definition and configure.py tool-version configuration. The Nix fetch hash was refreshed to match the new upstream decomp-toolkit release.

key_files.reason: Bumped the Nix-packaged decomp-toolkit version from 0.7.3 to 0.7.4 and updated the fetchFromGitHub sha256 hash.
Updated config.dtk_tag from v0.7.3 to v0.7.4 so non-Nix/project configuration references the same dtk release.

what_changed: Changed rustPlatform.buildRustPackage version for decomp-toolkit in .nix/decomp-toolkit.nix from "0.7.3" to "0.7.4".
Changed the Nix fetchFromGitHub hash for encounter/decomp-toolkit to sha256-y98KdVqUCAoe6vKpnooruX4abW+zxZq/nGUMzlxR6fY=.
smart_moves: Kept the Nix package version and configure.py dtk_tag in sync, avoiding a split where different setup paths would install or expect different decomp-toolkit versions.
Updated the fixed-output Nix source hash alongside the version bump, which is required for reproducible Nix builds when fetchFromGitHub rev changes.
decomp_lessons: When bumping dtk, update every tool-version source of truth used by the repository, not just the package manager file.
For Nix-based tooling, a decomp-toolkit version bump must include the corresponding sha256 hash for the new GitHub source revision.
Small toolchain PRs can still matter for decompilation work because matching/build behavior depends on consistent versions of shared analysis and build tools.
naming_conventions: The Nix package uses pname = "decomp-toolkit" and version without the leading v, e.g. "0.7.4".
configure.py stores the decomp-toolkit tag as config.dtk_tag with the leading v, e.g. "v0.7.4".
The Nix rev is derived as rev = "v${version}", tying the tag name to the version field.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that bump config.dtk_tag or .nix/decomp-toolkit.nix to newer decomp-toolkit versions.
Check whether dtk v0.7.4 introduced matching or analysis behavior changes relevant to subsequent decomp PRs.
Audit repository tooling docs for references to dtk v0.7.3 that may have needed updating outside this PR.
